error_signature: Select input field does not reset to placeholder
title: Resetting Select Input Field to Placeholder
symptom: After a user removes their selection from a Select input field, the previously selected value remains visible instead of showing the placeholder text.
applies_when: User has selected an option in the Select input
User wants to reset the selection
not_this_if: Select input is already showing the placeholder text
root_cause: The Select input field retains the last selected value even after the user attempts to clear their selection, which can lead to confusion if the placeholder is not displayed.
fix_steps: Create a clear button in the UI
Add a workflow to the button that resets the Select input variable to empty when clicked
agent_instruction: Implement a clear button that resets the Select input to show the placeholder text again.
